'''ât-w-n-t''' ('''katawnetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lariat|lariat]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-w-n-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lariat|lariat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-w-n-t
|-
! Lemma
| katawnetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitawnetoko|thitawnetoko]] || [[word:jitawnetoko|jitawnetoko]] || [[word:shitawnetoko|shitawnetoko]] || [[word:kitawnetoko|kitawnetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutawnetoko|thuthutawnetoko]] || [[word:jujutawnetoko|jujutawnetoko]] || [[word:shushutawnetoko|shushutawnetoko]] || [[word:kukutawnetoko|kukutawnetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutawnetoko|thutawnetoko]] || [[word:jutawnetoko|jutawnetoko]] || [[word:shutawnetoko|shutawnetoko]] || [[word:kutawnetoko|kutawnetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutawnetoko|thutawnetoko]] || [[word:jutawnetoko|jutawnetoko]] || [[word:shutawnetoko|shutawnetoko]] || [[word:kutawnetoko|kutawnetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetawnetoko|thetawnetoko]] || [[word:jetawnetoko|jetawnetoko]] || [[word:shetawnetoko|shetawnetoko]] || [[word:ketawnetoko|ketawnetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotawnetoko|thothotawnetoko]] || [[word:jojotawnetoko|jojotawnetoko]] || [[word:shoshotawnetoko|shoshotawnetoko]] || [[word:kokotawnetoko|kokotawnetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotawnetoko|thotawnetoko]] || [[word:jotawnetoko|jotawnetoko]] || [[word:shotawnetoko|shotawnetoko]] || [[word:kotawnetoko|kotawnetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotawnetoko|thotawnetoko]] || [[word:jotawnetoko|jotawnetoko]] || [[word:shotawnetoko|shotawnetoko]] || [[word:kotawnetoko|kotawnetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtawnetoko|thĂŠtawnetoko]] || [[word:jĂŠtawnetoko|jĂŠtawnetoko]] || [[word:shĂŠtawnetoko|shĂŠtawnetoko]] || [[word:kĂŠtawnetoko|kĂŠtawnetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatawnetoko|thathatawnetoko]] || [[word:jajatawnetoko|jajatawnetoko]] || [[word:shashatawnetoko|shashatawnetoko]] || [[word:kakatawnetoko|kakatawnetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatawnetoko|thatawnetoko]] || [[word:jatawnetoko|jatawnetoko]] || [[word:shatawnetoko|shatawnetoko]] || [[word:katawnetoko|katawnetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatawnetoko|thatawnetoko]] || [[word:jatawnetoko|jatawnetoko]] || [[word:shatawnetoko|shatawnetoko]] || [[word:katawnetoko|katawnetoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
